text.title: Weighted Decision Matrix Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Question: tenant datastore. Options: Postgres / Mongo / CockroachDB. Weights set by tech-lead (data-fit 30%, familiarity 20%, ecosystem 15%), SRE (ops 20%), finance (TCO 15%). Evidence from POCs + benchmarks. Totals: Postgres 4.55, Mongo 3.50, Cockroach 2.95. Conflict named: TCO vs ops maturity → rule favours ops on production data. Postgres wins beyond 5% margin; no tie-break needed. Matrix attached to ADR-DATA-014.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
